overall.description: First-person exploration of a luxury modern coastal villa with Japanese architectural influences. The player character, holding a pistol, walks through covered exterior walkways, enters a bedroom with panoramic ocean views and traditional decor, examines a holographic display, and exits to an infinity pool deck overlooking the rocky coastline.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered exterior walkway of a modern villa, featuring stone patio flooring and white garage doors ahead. The player moves forward through the sheltered corridor, passing a living wall of greenery on the right, and approaches a stairwell leading upward.

segments.scene_description: The player ascends an exterior stairway with glass railings, transitioning from the covered walkway to an open-air upper deck with panoramic ocean views. The scene brightens significantly as the player approaches and enters the villa interior through traditional shoji doors.

segments.scene_description: Inside the master bedroom, the player explores a space blending modern luxury with Japanese aesthetics, featuring tatami-style flooring and a platform bed. The player approaches a holographic television displaying vibrant imagery, while large windows reveal the adjacent villa buildings and infinity pool outside.

segments.scene_description: The player surveys the bedroom's sleeping area, focusing on the platform bed and striking cherry blossom wall art. The camera pans across the room, capturing the interplay of natural light through large windows and revealing the rocky coastline and distant islands outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior pool deck with infinity pool and hot tub

events.description: exiting bedroom onto exterior stone patio with pool

agents.ego_description: leaving the bedroom through sliding doors and stepping onto the pool deck

entered.detail: rectangular pool with vanishing edge overlooking the ocean

covered pavilion with traditional Asian-style roof by the pool
wooden lounge chairs and side tables on stone patio

segments.scene_description: The player exits the bedroom onto a luxurious exterior pool deck featuring an infinity pool that blends into the ocean horizon. The stone patio includes a circular hot tub, outdoor lounge furniture, and a gazebo structure, with the modern villa's architecture framing the scenic coastal view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered exterior corridor into a luxurious Japanese-inspired bedroom and out onto a panoramic coastal deck. It begins in a covered walkway with stone flooring and a living wall of greenery, moving forward toward a stairwell that leads upward. As the camera ascends glass-railed stairs, the scene brightens and opens up to the ocean before transitioning through traditional shoji doors into a master bedroom featuring tatami flooring and a vibrant holographic display. The view then shifts across the interior's platform bed and cherry blossom art, with natural light streaming through large windows that reveal the rocky coastline and distant islands. Finally, the camera exits the room onto a sun-drenched pool deck, where an infinity pool, hot tub, and gazebo blend seamlessly into the horizon of the surrounding sea.
